thought.text: I see some issues in the grammar. Let me fix them:

reasoning_content:
I have multiple issues with the grammar:

1. Duplicate rules: `typeName` is defined twice (lines 176-178 and 180-182), and `postfixExpression` has duplicate `LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen` alternatives (lines 17-18)
2. `declarationSpecifier` has duplicate `typeSpecifier` alternatives (lines 118-119)
3. `jumpStatement` ends with `Goto Identifier Semi` twice (lines 239-240)
4. `declarationList` grammar has same name as `Ast2Asg` expects (but that's internal)
5. `postfixExpression` has two function call alternatives - this will cause ambiguity

Let me fix these issues.

action.old_str:
postfixExpression
    :   primaryExpression
        (   LeftBracket expression RightBracket
        |   LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
        |   LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
        |   Dot Identifier
        |   Arrow Identifier
        |   PlusPlus
        |   MinusMinus
        )*
    ;
action.new_str:
postfixExpression
    :   primaryExpression
        (   LeftBracket expression RightBracket
        |   LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
        |   Dot Identifier
        |   Arrow Identifier
        |   PlusPlus
        |   MinusMinus
        )*
    ;
